title.en: He came to the land of the Death Spiral.

content.en:
After Ye Tian received the coordinates of the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, he immediately rushed over.

Soon.

He came to the land of the Death Spiral.

Of course, from the outside, you can't see a big whirlpool, only a shock flow somewhere where wrong with it.

"This is it!" Ye Tian guessed, "The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor should have encountered a shock current vortex in another area and was teleported here. "

He also has a little understanding of the land of the Death Vortex, this land of the Death Vortex is mobile, constantly moving with the shock flow, and without the cultivation of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, once he falls into it, he can't get out at all.

And if you want to smash the land of the Death Vortex, you need the strength of at least nine Blood Transformation Realms.

"Go in first!"

Ye Tian tore a hole and fled directly into the land of the death vortex.

......

"Another cultivator!"

One after another, the Blood Transformation Realm creatures stared at Ye Tian who came in.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, why did you come in?" The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was stunned, didn't he ask Ye Tian to find a seven-time Blood Transformation Realm powerhouse for help, what was the matter with the Endless Heavenly Ancestor coming in by himself?

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, I'll take you out, where is the thing?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There it is!"

The Dragon's Tooth Heavenly Ancestor pointed in the direction.

Ye Tian fled directly, and the other Blood Transformation Realm creatures were full of doubts, but they also followed.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Ancient Golden Leaf.

"Sure enough, it's the Ancient Golden Leaf!" Ye Tian was very excited.

This is an ownerless primeval gold leaf, with this primeval gold leaf, he can cultivate another primeval technique.

Airplanes!

His immeasurable will merges with the primeval gold leaf and comprehends the primeval art above.

"Primordial!"

This is an ancient technique of body method, and once it is practiced, it will help him a lot in combat effectiveness, because he is lacking such a body method type ancient technique.

"This thing is mine!"

Ye Tian reached out and grabbed the primeval leaf.

"This leaf can't be moved!" said a fifth-time Blood Transformation Creature.

All the Blood Transformation Realm creatures here have experimented, but they can't move this leaf.

And Ye Tian naturally knew the reason, if he wanted to move the Ancient Golden Leaf, he needed at least six Blood Transformation Realm strengths, and the highest one here was only five Blood Transformation Realm creatures, so it was strange to be able to move the Ancient Golden Leaf!

When taking away the primeval golden leaf, Ye Tian used the power of the primeval technique to seal it so that his aura would not be exposed.

Click!

The primeval gold leaf was moved by Ye Tian, and then put it away.

Seeing this scene, these Blood Transformation Realm creatures were immediately shocked.

"How did he do it?"

These Blood Transformation Realm creatures were stunned.

At this time, Ye Tian looked at the piece of wood again.

"Hey, this piece of wood has the breath of the primeval gold leaf, it should belong to the same category as the primeval gold leaf, could it be ......"

Ye Tian thought of a possibility, that is, the Ancient Golden Tree.

In the primeval era of the boundary between the territorial waters, an ancient gold tree was born, and the primeval gold leaf grew on the primeval gold tree.

At the beginning, the battle of the primeval race was to snatch the primeval gold leaf, which caused the primeval gold tree to be broken into pieces, and this piece of wood should be a fragment of the primeval gold tree, and it was a relatively core fragment.

Because according to the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, this piece of wood will exude a golden substance that can improve cultivation.

This golden substance should be the primeval gold juice in the body of the primeval gold tree!

This piece of wood is huge, and there must have been a lot of primeval gold juice inside!

So he took the piece of wood away.

"Hey, this piece of wood is our hope to improve our strength, what do you do when you put it away, once you put it away, it won't excrete golden substance!" the five-time blood mutant creature stopped.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly and directly shook the other party away.

The next moment, Ye Tian exuded an ancient aura, which directly made this group of Blood Transformation Realm creatures unable to move.

"This breath ......"

These Blood Transformation Realms immediately flattered: "Powerful cultivator, you should be sure to leave, please take us with you!"

"Why?"

Ye Tian didn't bother to pay attention to them.

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, I promised to take you out, are you still leaving?" Ye Tian looked at Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

"Let's go!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor hurriedly said.

"Okay, let's get out then!"

Ye Tian grabbed the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, directly tore through the land of the Death Vortex, and rushed out from here.

......

The Dragon's Tooth Heavenly Ancestor sensed the familiar shock current, and knew that he had come out of the Death Vortex Land.

"Thank you Endless Heavenly Ancestor!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor thanked.

"Just take what you need!" Ye Tian immediately left directly, leaving the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor here, he had no obligation to send the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor back.

When the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor saw Ye Tian leave, he didn't think it had anything to do with it.

At this moment, he was only amazed by Ye Tian's strength.

Ye Tian's cultivation was obviously only five Blood Transformation Realms, but his combat strength had definitely reached seven Blood Transformation Realms, otherwise he would not be able to save him!

"A boundary-breaking genius, there's no way to use five Blood Transformation Realm cultivation to have the combat power of seven Blood Transformation Realms!

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor felt how ridiculous his previous idea of wanting to compare himself with Ye Tian was!

"Forget it, let's go back to Wanlong's territorial waters, the territorial sea boundary gap is too dangerous!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor sighed.

......

Universal City.

Ye Tian is back, and he is in a very good mood.

This time, the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was really his lucky star, and he sent him two treasures at once!

Originally, this was an opportunity that belonged to the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, but unfortunately his strength was not enough!

Ye Tian took out the head of the primeval golden tree and pinched it hard, but the head of the primeval golden tree did not move at all.

"It's very sturdy!"

Immediately, he condensed the primeval blood spear, an ancient technique, and attacked this primeval golden tree head with great force!

Click!

A crack opened in the wood.

Bang bang bang!!

Under the attack again and again, this piece of wood was completely cracked, revealing a void hidden inside the wood, which stored a large amount of primeval gold juice!

"At least tens of millions of drops of Swire Gold Juice!"

Ye Tian was excited.

The value and effect of the Ancient Gold Juice are all above the Ancient Gold Water, and it is also very useful to cultivators, so much Ancient Gold Juice can definitely raise his cultivation to the sixth Blood Transformation Realm.

Once his cultivation broke through to the Sixth Blood Transformation Realm, his strength could surpass that of the Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

"There is also this primeval technique, the primeval body, you still have to collect and trade some primeval gold blood and practice it!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian mainly used the primeval gold juice to cultivate.

Although the Swire Gold Juice was not particularly helpful to him, it was at least useful, so his heart continued to strengthen and become stronger and stronger with the help of the Swire Gold Juice!
